content.en:
Soon.

Ye Xingchen broke through to the one-dimensional realm of the Yuanxing system, but his strength did not improve.

After all, he was a Nine Realm powerhouse himself, and just one dimensional realm naturally couldn't improve his strength.

With the passage of time, Ye Xingchen's Yuanxing System realm became higher and higher.

Meanwhile.

A large number of Terran extradimensional realms entered the Yuanxing region and taught the Yuanxing system, at first they were very puzzled by the Yuanxing system, but Ye Tian let them cultivate, and they naturally cultivated.

......

The 1086 area of the Abyss Star is far away from the Abyss Star Fragment, but it is not suppressed, and the extra-dimensional realm of the first realm can also survive here.

One of them, Ye Hu, a super-dimensional realm of the first realm, began to cultivate the Yuanxing ~ system.

He is a member of the Ye family and a descendant of Ye Tian, but after countless generations, many strong people in the human race now have the surname Ye, even if they are not surnamed Ye, they also have the blood of the Ye family, and the high-level are all - so.

And Ye Hu is undoubtedly a very ordinary first-level extradimensional realm.

However, after cultivating the Yuanxing system, he found that he could easily absorb a lot of Yuanxing power, and his physical fitness was improving at an extremely terrifying speed.

After only cultivating for a period of time, his physical fitness had improved by more than ten times.

"This ......"

Ye Hu was very excited, he thought that with his qualifications, potential and background, it would be very good to be able to become the third realm in the future.

After all, there are too many human races like him, and he doesn't have any advantages!

But now, he sees hope for his rise.

Soon, he reached the one-dimensional realm, then the two-dimensional realm, the three-dimensional realm.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Hu has reached the ten-dimensional realm, and his physical fitness is already extremely terrifying.

However, he is still the first realm's extradimensional realm, but his combat power is already enough to rival the existence of the fifth realm.

In addition, his cultivation speed in the Transcendent Realm was also more than ten times faster than before, and it wouldn't be long before he could break through to the Second Realm.

Ye Hu's Abyss Star System cultivated extremely quickly, so it was naturally valued by the high-level of the Human Race, and then let it approach the Abyss Star Fragment to cultivate.

this day.

Ye Tian heard about this and asked people to bring Ye Hu over.

"Meet the Ancestor!"

Ye Hu was very nervous when he saw Ye Tian.

"Don't be nervous!" Ye Tian said lightly, he took a look at Ye Hu, and even looked at it with the copying talent, and found that Ye Hu had actually given birth to a talent-the talent of the abyss!

Under normal circumstances, it is impossible for human beings to give birth to such talents, perhaps under the influence of the Abyssal Star System, a very small number of human beings have given birth to such talents, and this probability is extremely low.

And Ye Hu's Yuanzhi talent is very high, which is why he can grow so fast in the Yuanxing system.

"Ye Hu, you are very good, you are very talented in the Yuanxing system. The Yuanxing System is a system created by me, and its potential is very good, if you cultivate to the extreme, it is enough to match the peak existence of the Ninth Realm!" Ye Tian said.

The pinnacle of the ninth realm!!!

Ye Hu took a deep breath, in the upper domain, there are very few in the eighth realm, and the peak of the ninth realm is the existence of the real peak, can he still become such a powerhouse?

Of course, he also knew that this must be very difficult, but he was indeed able to rise completely with the help of the Abyssal Star System.

"In the future, the Terrans will put you on the list of key cultivators. In the future, you will focus on cultivating the Yuanxing system, and the cultivation system of the Transcendent Dimensional Realm can be accompanied by cultivation, so you don't need to think too much about it. Ye Tian proposed.

"Yes, Ancestor!"

Ye Hu responded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian personally went to check the extra-dimensional realm where the entire human race came to cultivate here, checked their talents, and found dozens of extra-dimensional realms with abyssal talents, but the talents were uneven, and Ye Hu's abyssal talent was the highest.

"If we continue to cultivate like this, the descendants of these extradimensional realms will definitely have a talent that is not weak. "

Ye Tian muttered.

If it comes through the ordinary extradimensional realm, it will be too difficult for human beings to rise, but the Abyss Star System is a hope.

Really.

Next, the Abyssal Star System of the Human Race continued to grow, giving birth to many strong people above the Ten Dimensional Realm, maybe they were still very weak, but as long as the Abyssal Star System continued to grow, and then cultivated other systems, their strength would be extremely terrifying.

Unconsciously, the human race has cultivated the Yuanxing System for 10 million years.

It's been a long time.

Now, Ye Xingchen has cultivated the Yuanxing system to the eighteen-dimensional realm, and the human race has also given birth to many other eighteen-dimensional realm powerhouses, these powerhouses have also cultivated the super-dimensional realm system to an extremely high realm with the help of the Yuanxing system, and their strength is very strong.

However, it is a little difficult for these eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses to achieve the ultimate level, which is also a huge bottleneck for them.

To this end, Ye Tian created a lot of Ultimate Secret Methods, and even burned his Ultimate Dimension Killing Trick Yuan Body on a stone tablet for them to comprehend.

Not only that, Ye Tian also continued to study the Abyss Star System, and once again created the ultimate dimensional killing moves of the two Abyss Star Systems.

Hand of the Abyss!

Spear of the Abyss!

He also burned these two ultimate dimensional killing moves for the powerhouses of the eighteenth dimension to observe.

As the years passed, one after another of the Extreme Secret Methods of the Abyss Star System were created by Ye Tian.

this day.

Ye Xingchen took the lead in breaking through, and his body began to be the ultimate of the Yuanxing system, and his strength was further improved.

And Ye Tian also knew very well that if he wanted all the Terran Extradimensional Realms to make achievements in the Abyssal Star System, he had to have the talent of Abyss, otherwise it would be difficult to improve.

He can raise his sons in a big way, but he can't train them in the same way, and he can't afford to spend more resources.

Therefore, he is going to create a special Abyssal Star Secret Method, so that these extradimensional realms can condense a false Abyssal Talent, and this false Abyssal Talent can also have the effect of the Abyssal Talent, which can allow them to absorb the power of the Abyssal Star faster.

And this kind of Abyssal Star Secret Method is not simple, for this reason, Ye Tian even copied some weak and extra-dimensional realm bodies and tried it himself.

Tens of millions of years have passed since this experiment.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian created a secret method of the Abyssal Star - Abyssal Star Technique!

The Abyssal Star Technique is based on the powder of the Abyssal Star Fragment and some special materials to condense a miniature Abyssal Star Core in the body, which is equivalent to a false Abyssal Star talent, which can allow them to absorb the power of the Abyssal Star faster.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian passed on this abysmic star technique, and every human race's extradimensional realm could be cultivated, but he had to make an oath and not pass it on.

After that, Ye Tian got a large amount of powder from the Yuanxing fragments and put it in the Terran Sanctuary for those extradimensional realms to exchange.

Soon.

Many extra-dimensional realms have successively practiced the Abyssal Star Technique, and the cultivation speed has skyrocketed many times, and more extra-dimensional realms have broken through to realms above the tenth dimension.

As more and more extradimensional realms entered the Abyssal Star System, Ye Tian was ready to move over a small Abyssal Star fragment.

this day.

He picked a small fragment of the Abyssal Star, moved it to the side of the multidimensional territory, and sent it to the territory of the Terrans again.

In this way, it is enough to support the cultivation of the Terran Abyssal Star System, and the power of the Abyssal Star Fragment will absorb external energy to recover, and there will be no depletion.

......

"The three hundred and thirteen supreme dimensional rules are getting closer and closer to the three hundred and sixty-five supreme dimensional rules!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Those strong people who can do it have spent endless years, and his cultivation time is still too short.

As for the ultimate dimension killing moves, since he spent most of his time studying the abyssal star system, he only created three ultimate dimensional killing moves: the abyssal body, the hand of the heavenly abyss, and the spear of the abyss, but he also created a total of eight ultimate dimensional killing moves, plus his supreme dimensional rule realm, his real combat power was no less than that of a strong man like the ancient ape true monarch.

this day.

Ye Tian was still studying the Abyssal Star System, and suddenly discovered that the Abyssal Star System still had the potential to be explored.

However, all he saw was the fragment of the Abyssal Star, the main body of the Abyssal Star, which he had not seen yet.

However, he didn't know where the main body of the Abyss was.

Thereupon.

He consulted Lord Duomi in the Void Heaven Palace.

"Lady Duomi!"

Ye Tian came to Lord Duomi and said respectfully.

When Duomi saw Ye Tian, she showed a slightly surprised look, "You are very good, with your current strength, you are not much weaker than the Lord of the True Wu Realm." "

"Lord Duomi, I want to know the location of the main body of the Abyssal Star. Ye Tian said.

"Yes, you need to pay 100,000 contributions!" said Duomi.

"What, so much contribution value?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Duomi smiled: "Little one, it's useless to just know the location, you must want to see it, and the way to see it is worth so much contribution value." "

"Okay, I'll pay!"

The 100,000 contribution value is not worth mentioning to him, he can afford it.

When Ye Tian paid 100,000 contribution points, Duo Mi said: "The main body of the Abyssal Star is in the Abyss River of the Sea of Dimensions, but the Abyss River is sealed by six Ultimate Realm Lords, and there is also an incarnation of the Ultimate Realm Lord guarding there. However, I can give you a token of the Ultimate Realm Lord, and if you go over with the token, that one will give you face and let you comprehend the main body of the Abyss Star. "

"It's also your luck that the Ultimate Realm Lord who guards the main body of the Yuan Star knows the Ultimate Realm Lord of the Void Heaven Palace, otherwise no matter how much you contribute, you won't want to go in. "

An incarnation of an Ultimate Realm Lord guarding the main body of the Abyssal Star?

Ye Tian was puzzled, wasn't the Yuan Star shattered, even if that main body was much larger than the other fragments, there was no need to guard it.

Could it be that there is a secret in it that he doesn't understand?

So, he asked, "Lord Duomi, why is the Ultimate Realm Lord guarding the main body of that Abyssal Star?"

Duomi explained: "I'll answer this question for free, because the Abyss is very special, and a special ultimate life was bred on it, and it was just a small corner of the Abyss that was just broken, and then provoked that ultimate life. In the end, the six Ultimate Realm Masters sealed the Ultimate Life, but they couldn't kill it. In order to prevent this ultimate life from escaping, he sent an incarnation of the ultimate realm lord to guard it, which was also to prevent the other party from coming out to retaliate. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Subsequently.

Duomi gave Ye Tian a token, and then told the specific location of Yuanhe.

After Ye Tian got the position, he immediately rushed to Yuanhe.

......

Abyssal River.

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and it took a long time to finally arrive here.

When he came here, he didn't see Yuanhe, but he sensed a depressing aura.

"Ye Tian of the Void Heaven Palace, if you want to enter the Yuanxing to have a look, please ask your seniors for permission. "

As he spoke, Ye Tian took out the token.

Wow!

A big hand directly grabbed Ye Tian and led him into the Yuanhe.

At this time, Ye Tiancai saw Yuanhe.

I saw a majestic and boundless river running through the void, surrounding an unimaginably huge star.

Compared to this star, that piece of abyssal star fragment is only less than one ten-thousandth of it!

This is the real Yuanxing!

And this real Yuanxing, its suppression is also very terrifying, even he feels great pressure.

"Little guy from the Void Heaven Palace, what are you doing here?"

A middle-aged man in a gray robe appeared and asked.

"Senior, I want to participate in the main body of the Abyss Star. Ye Tian said.

"Comprehend the main body of the Abyssal Star, you do have the breath of the Abyssal Star on your body, it seems that you have created a related ultimate dimensional killing move, could it be that you still want to comprehend something from the main body of the Abyssal Star?" the middle-aged man smiled.

"Senpai, I want to try!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, for the sake of the face of the one in your Void Heaven Palace, based on the time you have over there, you are allowed to comprehend 100 million domain yuan time here, and after 100 million domain yuan years, no matter what you have comprehended or not, leave me immediately. The middle-aged man said.

"Thank you, senior!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Immediately, he approached the Abyssal Star step by step, and after approaching the Abyssal Star for a distance, he felt his limit, so he did not continue to move forward, but began to comprehend the main body of the Abyssal Star.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Ten million domain dollars have passed!

Twenty million domain yuan time has passed!

During these years, his other replica bodies were also experimenting with this enlightenment, giving up other aspects of their practice.

Finally, after the sixty million domain yuan years, he had a substantial research result.

"I see!"

Ye Tian smiled.

There is indeed a possibility for the Yuanxing system to go further, and after the completion of the ultimate, he is the master of the ultimate, but any kind of ultimateness system has its own ultimate rules.

And the key to the Abyssal Star System is to comprehend the ultimate rules that belong to the Abyssal Star System.

As for the ultimate rules that others comprehend, they are the ultimate rules that belong to the existence of the Dimensional Sea itself.

There was more than one ultimate rule, and he was only now truly enlightened.

Each ultimate rule represents an ultimate system, and when an ultimate system goes to the extreme, it can break through to the ultimate realm.
